exercises.stem: I have a ___ and my head hurts.
exercises.analysis: head hurts（头疼）对应 headache（头痛）。stomachache（胃痛）、fever（发烧）、cough（咳嗽）与 head 无关。

exercises.stem: We should do something to reduce air ___.
exercises.analysis: air pollution 意为「空气污染」，reduce air pollution 意为「减少空气污染」。traffic（交通）、safety（安全）、environment（环境）不搭配 air。

exercises.stem: If you are sick, you should ___.
exercises.analysis: take medicine 是固定搭配，意为「吃药」。不能说 eat/have/drink medicine。

exercises.stem: traffic 是可数名词，可以说 two traffics。
exercises.analysis: traffic 是不可数名词，不能加 -s 变复数。正确用法是 some traffic 或 heavy traffic。

segments: You don't look well. You'd better ___1___ ___2___.
exercises.analysis: see a doctor 是固定搭配，意为「看医生」。You'd better 后接动词原形。

exercises.question: 请用以下词汇写一段关于健康的建议：have a rest, drink more water, take medicine, see a doctor。写一段话（至少3句话）。
exercises.referenceAnswer: If you are not feeling well, you should have a rest. Drink more water when you are sick. If your temperature is high, you need to take medicine. If you don't feel better, you should see a doctor.
scoringPoints: 正确使用至少4个给定词汇
内容合理，给出健康建议
